news.title: Melissa Riegle: Driven by legacy, defined by determination
news.summary_en: From the very beginning, Melissa Riegle was surrounded by a powerful legacy of engineering excellence.

news.title: EPICS has been impacting students, communities for 30 years
news.summary_en: Engineering Projects in Community Service — now called simply EPICS — is a transformative program that meets an industry need by equipping students with more than just technical skills but also the crucial professional skills that companies desperately seek.

news.title: March Edition: Newly Issued Patents
news.summary_en: Congratulations to Purdue Engineers who recently receive patents on their intellectual property from the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office.

news.title: Brain-inspired AI hardware by ECE's Roy helps with decision-making for autonomous devices
news.summary_en: A Purdue University engineer uses the brain's efficiency as inspiration to help autonomous vehicles, such as drones and robots, make crucial, time-sensitive decisions while operating in the field.
